title: Remove find local help navigation icon

requirements.text: Remove the bottom navigation icon that appears in the bottom-right corner of the screen
acceptanceCriteria: The circular navigation button with maximum z-index is no longer visible on any page
The BottomNavigationIcon component is removed or disabled
Users can still navigate between tabs using the standard tab navigation in EducationalContent

constraints: Do not modify the main tab navigation system in EducationalContent.tsx
Preserve all other navigation functionality including hash-based routing
nonGoals: Removing the 'Find Local Help' tab itself from the main navigation
Removing the TechnicianFinder component or its functionality
